user.title: Connect to Soterra
user.description: Enter the webhook URL from your property's Smart Home tab in the Soterra app.

data_description.webhook_url: Paste the full URL from Soterra (starts with https://)

entities.title: Select Safety Devices
entities.description: Choose which safety devices to monitor. Soterra will receive state changes and send push notifications for alarms.

error.invalid_url: Webhook URL must start with https://
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Soterra webhook. Check the URL and try again.
error.no_entities: Please select at least one entity to monitor.

abort.already_configured: This Soterra webhook is already configured.

init.title: Monitored Devices
init.description: Add or remove safety devices. Changes take effect immediately — Soterra will be notified of the updated device list.
